About Me Contact Me Surgeries Visit Parliament Newsletter All Posts Troon Irvine Prestwick Dreghorn The Villages The Coalfields Campaign win for safer streets in Aug 12, 2025 1 min read Campaign success! I’m delighted to have secured a reduction in the speed limit on the B743 from 60 to 40 miles per hour - ending a decade-long campaign by residents. After I held a public meeting on the issue earlier this year, I worked with Sergeant Slaven to ensure road safety measures were introduced. This change will make this road safer for everyone who uses it. I met with residents in St Quivox earlier today to celebrate!
